title: sql.cancel params
description: Parameters for the sql.cancel RPC method. Available only when the runtime exposes the method via feature flag. At least one of execution_id or request_id is required.

execution_id.description: Execution ID of the tracked streaming query to cancel

request_id.description: Request ID of the tracked streaming query to cancel

client_token.description: Opaque token (hex) or JWT for authorization. Required when enableClientTokenAuthorization is active and the stream was started with a client token. Aliases: clientToken, auth
